top_signals.title: Taiwan Stocks Poised for Correction as TSMC Fails To Impress
top_signals.summary: Taiwan stocks dropped, poised to enter a technical correction, as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s results stoked worries over heavy spending and a weaker outlook for profitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
